case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. PUCKETT, CHRISTA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUCKETT, CHRISTA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3160 ARMY ST #331 $1,230.22 RENT, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,335.22, LEASE FORFEITED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT PUCKETT, CHRISTA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT PUCKETT, CHRISTA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT PUCKETT, CHRISTA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
STIPULATION AND ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DEFAULT OF JUN-21-1994 SET ASIDE, JUDGMENT OF JUN-27-1994 SET ASIDE
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: CLARKE, KEVIN MICHAEL SUBSTITUTED FOR CHAVIS, GERALDINE LOUISE AS ATTORNEY FOR HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION
